narrative:
Miami Twp. township has 12,517 registered voters, with 52.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.0 percentage points.
